plot outline: Johnny is an emotionally stunted and softspoken radio journalist who travels the country interviewing a variety of kids about their thoughts concerning their world and their future. Then Johnny's saddled with caring for his young nephew Jesse. Jesse brings a new perspective and, as they travel from state to state, effectively turns the emotional tables on Johnny.
title: C'mon C'mon
akas: C'mon C'mon - Az élet megy tovább (Hungary)

other companies.name: People's Institute for Survival and Beyond
